title: leptospermum flavescens var. obovatum
intro: Leptospermum flavescens var. obovatum, commonly known as the Coastal Tea Tree, is a shrub native to Australia that belongs to the Myrtle family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Leptospermum flavescens var. obovatum include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support respiratory health. Leptospermum flavescens var. obovatum can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
